title: Dontostemon pectinatus
taxonomy: Dontostemon pectinatus is classified in the kingdom Plantae, with the family Brassicaceae being its primary classification. The genus Dontostemon also falls under the family Brassicaceae, indicating its close relation to other plants in this family. Dontostemon pectinatus can be further classified into the order Brassicales, which is a larger group of flowering plants. The species Dontostemon pectinatus is also known to be classified into the section and section Donia. Overall, the classification of Dontostemon pectinatus reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other plants.
